name: "Leaving flowers for a beloved.." ~ pastry cookie
description:
It's a cloudless, sunny day.. who better to share it with than your beloved friend (vague.. white lily or one of the 4 dead beasts).. right?

But they're gone now.. maybe you should go visit them?

~~

Angsty little idea i had.. no beta we die like white lily

Yes this is post war... obviously

(Location description:

Circular outcove of a park, with statues lining the perimeter for the dead cookies from the war

The center intentionally has no statue, so gatherings could be held, and so all the statues may face eachother.

On the far left is eternal sugar, standing with her wings spread open, in a welcoming gesture. It's often visited by those who went to her garden while she was alive.

The next statue in the sequence is silent salt's, though its often overlooked or ignored, he stands in his 'ready' position with his sword held in front of him, tip facing the ground, brandishing his souljam. Noone has visited his grave yet, though occasionally some come to say hello when visiting white lily

In the middle, at the farest end of the outcove is white lily, holding her staff in a standing position which reads as shy. This statue has the largest base, featuring steps large enough to comfortably sit on. (her hands folded in front of her, holding the staff up only a little..) her grave is visited by many, including pure vanilla cookie himself. And is always covered in lilies and gifts.. only occasionally does pure vanilla collect the gifts, for safe keeping.

Behind her statue, sitting on the steps that wrap behind, facing the other direction, is dark enchantress. Many of the cookies of darkness have stopped by to leave things for her (..such as an umbrella, various blankets, etc.), occasionally non-cod members visit, but most dont even realise she's there.

The next in the sequence is mystic flour, standing how she usually did (doing the hand thing ^^), she doesnt get gifts often, but sometimes cloud haetae has lunch nearby the statue.

Burning spice is on the far right, sort of guarding mystic flour, pointing his axe in the direction of the walkway, with his usual face of contentment and confidence.

He doesnt get many gifts either, but golden cheese occasionally leaves trinkets on his head so others cannot take them.)
creator: Lav0lin_Industries
